# Drive AI Sales Inc.

> Drive AI Sales Inc. is a car dealership's own all-in-one AI CRM, custom-built for each store. It answers every lead in under 60 seconds across phone, SMS, email and social, 24/7, using Voice AI and automation, then qualifies, books and follows up. Built in Edmonton, Alberta, for dealerships across Western Canada.

Drive AI is not a bolt-on add-on. It is a complete CRM platform (visual sales pipelines, one unified inbox, calendars, websites, forms, payments, reporting) with conversational and voice AI layered on top, custom-tailored to each dealership over a roughly 90-day build. It can also connect to the DMS, phone system, inventory feeds and tools a dealership already runs. Integrations are scoped on a discovery call, not every integration is guaranteed, and some may carry additional API cost.

## What Drive AI does
- Answers inbound leads in under 60 seconds on phone, SMS, email, Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp and Google
- Voice AI ("Wanda") picks up inbound and overflow calls 24/7, qualifies callers, books appointments, and speaks 50+ languages, most callers can't tell it's AI
- Lead qualification and routing, appointment booking with auto confirmations and reminders, follow-up and re-engagement cadences
- Full all-in-one CRM: visual pipelines, unified inbox, calendars, websites and funnels, forms, payments and invoicing, reputation management, and source-to-close reporting
- Custom automations built around each dealership's exact process (equity mining, service-to-sales, trade-in follow-up, win-backs)

## Key facts
- Category: All-in-one AI CRM for car dealerships (your dealership's own CRM, not a bolt-on)
- Response time: under 60 seconds, every channel, 24/7
- Build: custom-tailored over roughly a 90-day rollout, working closely with the dealer
- Integrations: connects to existing DMS/CRM/phone/inventory where the platform's API allows; scoped on the discovery call; some require custom work or additional cost
- Data ownership: the dealership owns 100% of its customer and lead data; compliant with PIPEDA and Alberta's PIPA
- Oversight: human-in-the-loop, every AI conversation can be reviewed, edited or taken over in real time; AMVIC/OMVIC advertising rules configured in
- Founded: 2025, Edmonton, Alberta, Canada
- Serves: car dealerships across Western Canada (British Columbia, Alberta, Saskatchewan, Manitoba)
- Languages: 50+ (English, French, Spanish, Punjabi, Mandarin and more)

- [Home](https://www.driveaisales.com/): Overview, the AI core, the platform and results
- [What We Automate](https://www.driveaisales.com/#services): The full list of automations and 24/7 workflows
- [Why Us](https://www.driveaisales.com/why-us): The platform explained, the house, the guts and the engine
- [Compare](https://www.driveaisales.com/vs-competitors): Drive AI vs DriveCentric, DealerSocket, VinSolutions, Reynolds, CDK, Matador, Activix and Unleashd
- [FAQ](https://www.driveaisales.com/faq): Detailed answers on CRM, integrations, pricing, data ownership and the build process
- [About](https://www.driveaisales.com/about): The founding team and why Drive AI was built
- [Contact](https://www.driveaisales.com/contact): Phone, AI line, email, hours and office location
- [Blog](https://www.driveaisales.com/blog): Plain-spoken guides, playbooks and comparisons for dealers

## Blog articles
- [What Is an AI CRM for Car Dealerships?](https://www.driveaisales.com/blog/what-is-an-ai-crm-for-car-dealerships): Plain-English guide to the category; CRM vs AI CRM, all-in-one vs bolt-on, Voice AI, custom build, data ownership and Canadian compliance
- [Lead Response Time: Why Speed Wins the Car Sale](https://www.driveaisales.com/blog/lead-response-time-car-sales): The verified speed-to-lead data and why answering in under 60 seconds, 24/7, decides who wins the deal
- [AI CRM vs DriveCentric, VinSolutions, DealerSocket](https://www.driveaisales.com/blog/ai-crm-vs-drivecentric-vinsolutions-dealersocket): A fair, criteria-by-criteria comparison for Western Canadian dealers
- [AI and Compliance for Canadian Dealers: PIPEDA & AMVIC](https://www.driveaisales.com/blog/ai-compliance-canadian-dealers-pipeda-amvic): How to use AI and automation without breaking PIPEDA, Alberta PIPA, CASL or AMVIC/OMVIC rules
